title: Upscaled Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) 32x
description: 32x Resource pack for the AE2 mod
body:
Upscaled Mekanism 32x is a [Faithful](https://faithfulpack.net/)\-style resource pack that provides higher-resolution textures for the [Applied Energetics 2]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/applied-energistics-2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)) mod. It enhances visual clarity while preserving the original style, offering a sharper and more detailed 32×32 look.


![](https://imgur.com/Mbh5hMm.png) ![](https://imgur.com/39AZY5w.png)


### **Addon Support** * AE Infinity Booster * AE2: Crafting Tree * AE2 Import Export Card * AE2 Network Analyser * Applied Energistics 2 Wireless Terminals * Applied Flux * Applied Mekanistics * Ars Énergistique * ME Requester * Mega Cells

### **Credits** * [Improved Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/improved-applied-energistics-2) - Some textures from this pack were based on Improved AE2 Resource Pack * [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) - Some textures from this pack were based on Faithful 32x
